videos.description: things we need in movies again: intro of the main character getting ready in glimpses to an uplifting song ❣️  the devil wears prada has been a comfort movie for myself and so many people, and in a world where sequels are now mostly nostalgia bait and not thoroughly thought out, i was nervous for the 2nd one! but i can say it definitely exceeded my expectations. they really nailed it with the devil wears prada 2. It feels modern but not cheesy, the characters actually felt like they grew and had a life in all of these years while still keeping their essence, the plot was entertaining and FUN, and it was actually very funny while also providing some social commentary about the state of the world and journalism. It was an absolute delight 👠  #thedevilwearsprada

videos.title: I thought about it a lot and I have come to the conclusion that I mig...
videos.description: I thought about it a lot and I have come to the conclusion that I might be an overthinker ☁️  thank you @Musicbed for an incredibly inspiring few days 📷 meeting other creatives and hanging out made me realize we’re not too different from each other. Sometimes you see other people making and creating so much and you start to overanalize yourself and your art but… I mean it when I say we’re not alone. We all go through ups and downs, so I’m gonna try to overthink a little less and enjoy the process a little more. 🌿

videos.title: 100 movies i love 📼 4. still walking 🚶🏻‍♂️🌳🪦🇯🇵⛩️ “Even when they die,...
videos.description: 100 movies i love 📼 4. still walking 🚶🏻‍♂️🌳🪦🇯🇵⛩️ “Even when they die, people don’t really go away.” Hirokazu Kore-eda is a storyteller I admire. The way he portrays everyday life is so honest and beautiful. How his characters deal with things such as grief and what that does to familial relationships, how parents express their disappointments, how kids react to tough situations… I just love this kind of “mundane” cinema, it really makes me feel alive. What’s your favorite Koreeda movie? I’m definitely speaking about him again throughout this series.
